services.name: Azure Front Door
services.description: Global traffic routing and acceleration for multi-region access

services.name: App Service
services.description: E-commerce web and API tier serving customers

services.name: Azure Cache for Redis
services.description: Session state and cart caching for low-latency access

services.name: Azure Cosmos DB
services.description: Globally distributed product catalog and order data

services.name: Azure Event Grid
services.description: Eventing backbone for order processing workflows

services.name: Azure Functions
services.description: Order processing handlers reacting to order events

connections.label: Route user traffic to nearest healthy regional app
Read and update session and cart state
Query global product catalog and persist orders
Deliver order events to processing handlers
Update order status and inventory reservations

workflow.description: Customer traffic is routed to the closest healthy region
Application retrieves session and cart state for the user
Product catalog and pricing are read from the global database
Order submission triggers an event for downstream processing
Event-driven functions process the order and update records

metadata.prompt: A multi-region e-commerce system with Cosmos DB for global product catalog, Azure Front Door for traffic routing, Redis Cache for sessions, and Event Grid for order processing
